◎译　　名　德加的小舞女
◎片　　名　La Petite danseuse de Degas
◎年　　代　2010
◎产　　地　法国
◎类　　别　音乐 / 歌舞 / 传记

◎主　　演　马休•加尼奥( Mathieu Ganio


◎简　　介  

　　Freed from her glass prison, the famous wax sculpture named the Little Fourteen-Year-Old Dancer takes life under the gaze of choreographer Patrice Bart. Basing his work on the true story of Marie Van Goethem, who was Degas’ model, Bart delves into the past of the Opera and tells us the sorrowful fate of one of the Corps de Ballet’s ballerinas, and, above all, depicts us the sce...
